title: Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain Dark Oak 1L- Durable and Weather-Resistant Finish, Fast Drying, Vibrant Color for Decks, Fences, & Furniture, Available in Many Wood Shades
features: Gives long lasting protection to all external wood
description: From the manufacturer About Us Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with 50 pounds. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the good brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins ESDO1000 1L Satin Outdoor Wood Stain - Dark Oak Rustins Exterior Wood Stain product is quick drying, very durable and available in gloss and satin. Gives long lasting protection to all external wood, and is touch dry in 30 minutes, re-coatable in 4 hours. Clean brushes in water.

specifications_table.Coverage: ‎Covers up to 62.5 sq. ft. per liter
